name: Mount Gibson Iron Limited
description: MGX Resources Limited (formerly Mount Gibson Iron) is an established independent mid-tier West Australian miner and project developer. Since commencing iron ore production in 2004, the company has built a strong reputation for successful project development, most notably through its high-grade hematite mining operations at Koolan Island. While historically focused on iron ore, the company is actively diversifying its portfolio into precious and base metals. Listed on the Australian Securities Exchange (ASX: MGX), the company continues to leverage its expertise in bulk commodities to drive growth and sustainability across its mining operations.
